textPlain: I clicked on the link ready to invest in this ETF but was disappointed

Jobs called it "Google in paperback form" [1]. I wonder what obscure source of information today we'll be comparing to the mainstream sources of tomorrow.[1] https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2011/oct/09/steve-job...

This is pretty COOL! Right up my alley. I have been working on a similar project with PUNK ZINES. I have a lil loop going with Internet Archive - Scraped all of their zines and any new submissions I upload to them. Yours is much prettier than mine. NICE NICE job. Bookmark.
